# Albion Online Analyzer - llms.txt
# This file helps AI search engines understand our website content

# About Albion Online Analyzer
Albion Online Analyzer is a comprehensive toolkit for Albion Online players, providing builds, tools, and profit calculators.

# Main Sections
- Builds: /builds - Character builds and guides for Albion Online
- Tools: /tools - Various gameplay tools including Market Flipper, PvP Intel, Crafting Calculator
- Profits: /profits - Profit calculators for gathering and crafting activities
- Forum: /forum - Community discussions and threads

# Key Tools
- Market Flipper: /tools/market-flipper - Track and find profitable market flips
- PvP Intel: /tools/pvp-intel - Real-time PvP intelligence
- Crafting Calculator: /tools/crafting-calc - Calculate crafting profits
- Gold Price: /tools/gold-price - Track gold prices
- Kill Feed: /tools/kill-feed - Live kill feed tracker
- ZvZ Tracker: /tools/zvz-tracker - Zone vs Zone battle tracker

# Profit Calculators
- Alchemy: /profits/alchemy
- Cooking: /profits/cooking
- Farming: /profits/farming
- Labour: /profits/labour
- Animal: /profits/animal
- Chopped Fish: /profits/chopped-fish
- Enchanting: /profits/enchanting

# Important Pages
- About: /about
- Privacy Policy: /privacy
- Terms of Service: /terms
